case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY** MANUEL A. ROJAS ET AL VS. AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, MAR-21-2023 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION AND FOR SANCTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO TRANSFER AND FOR SANCTIONS" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Continued To Aug-16-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc. Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KELLI A. HERZOG, Esq. of Grotefeld Hoffman LLP (Tel: 415-989-9670) for defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.'s Motion To Transfer Action And For Sanctions.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to transfer and for sanctions" is granted.

Counsel for defendant is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
